title: Raccoon Removal in Bensonhurst, Brooklyn | $900-$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Bensonhurst, Brooklyn. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Serving residential homes and commercial properties. Call now for fast service!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Bensonhurst, Brooklyn, where they find shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces of the neighborhood's residential homes and multi-family buildings. Our professional raccoon removal services protect Bensonhurst properties from these destructive wildlife intruders with humane, effective solutions. Best Pest Control NYC provides complete raccoon trapping, exclusion, and damage repair throughout the 11214 area.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Bensonhurst residents for years with licensed, insured wildlife control specialists who understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn's urban raccoon populations. We offer same-day emergency service, humane removal methods, and comprehensive exclusion work to ensure raccoons don't return to your property.
localContext: Bensonhurst's tree-lined streets, proximity to parks like Milestone Park and Seth Low Playground, and mix of single-family homes and apartment buildings create ideal conditions for raccoon activity. The neighborhood's older housing stock with accessible attics and roof gaps makes properties particularly vulnerable to raccoon intrusions, especially during breeding season.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Bensonhurst?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Bensonhurst typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and any necessary cleanup or repairs. A basic single raccoon removal starts around $900, while extensive infestations with multiple animals, attic damage, and full exclusion work can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Bensonhurst, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Bensonhurst due to abundant food sources from garbage bins, proximity to green spaces, and accessible shelter in residential attics and chimneys. The neighborhood's housing density and mature trees provide ideal habitat for urban raccoon populations, with activity peaking during spring breeding season and fall when they seek winter shelter.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Bensonhurst property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for raccoon emergencies in Bensonhurst. Initial trap placement typically occurs within 24 hours of your call, with most raccoons captured within 3-7 days. Complete removal including all animals, exclusion work, and cleanup generally takes 1-2 weeks depending on the situation and whether babies are present.

faqs.question: Do you handle raccoon damage repair and cleanup in Bensonhurst?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complete raccoon damage restoration including attic insulation replacement, contaminated material removal, sanitization, odor control, and entry point repairs. Raccoons can cause significant structural damage and leave hazardous waste, so professional cleanup is essential. Our team repairs damaged soffits, vents, roofing, and screens to restore your Bensonhurst property and prevent future intrusions.
